title: Cobblemon Enhanced
description: A fully customized Cobblemon experience with 100+ custom QOL / legendary spawning items, a full progression system, Create, dozens of smaller QOL mods, and more!
body:
Experience Cobblemon like never before, with over 100 custom items, tons of new recipes, unique progression, lots of QOL changes, and more! Notable features include:

- Mega Evolution (Including Z-A + DLC Megas), Z-Moves, Dynamax, Terastallization, Raid Dens, -Pokenav, Breeding, and more!
- Spawn items for all 100+ legendaries & mythicals, Ultra Beasts, and Paradox Pokemon
- A progression system using the Radical Cobblemon Trainers mod
- Custom Portable Healer & PC items
- Custom recipes for hard-to-get items, unbreakable tools, Artifacts, and Create creative items
- Tons of QOL and performance mods!

**Note: 4 GB RAM is recommended for this pack.**

## Cobblemon Mods / Addons
- All The Mons
- Mega Showdown
- Z-A Megas
- Radical Cobblemon Trainers
- SimpleTMs
- Cobbreeding
- Raid Dens
- Journey Mounts
- Spawn Notification
- Cobblemon Unchained
- Cobblemon Integrations

## QOL / Content Mods
- Aether + Deep Aether
- Artifacts
- Better Combat
- Chipped
- [Corpse](https://modrinth.com/mod/corpse)
- [Cosmetic Armor](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-reworked)
- Create + Create Jetpack
- Create Crafts & Additions
- Deeper & Darker
- [Easy Villagers](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/easy-villagers)
- Explorers + Nature's Compass
- Iron Furnaces
- Modular Routers
- Macaw's Mods
- Sophisticated Backpacks + Storage
- Storage Drawers
- Tom's Simple Storage Mod
- Waystones
- YUNG's Mods
- ...and many more!
